name: Blinded
desc: A blinded creature can't see and automatically fails Ability checks that require sight.
Attack rolls against the creature have advantage.
The creature's attack rolls have disadvantage.
end_state: Condition ends when the source of blindness is removed or duration expires

name: Charmed
desc: A charmed creature can't attack the charmer.
The charmer has advantage on Ability checks to interact with the creature.
Some class features can charm enemies, such as Bard's Charm Person or Paladin's Turn the Unholy.
end_state: Condition ends when the duration expires or the charmer attacks the creature

name: Deafened
desc: A deafened creature can't hear and automatically fails Ability checks that require hearing.
The creature has disadvantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing.
end_state: Condition ends when the source of deafness is removed or duration expires

name: Exhaustion
desc: Exhaustion is measured in 6 levels. Each level imposes increasingly severe penalties.
Level 1: Disadvantage on Ability checks.
Level 2: Speed halved.
Level 3: Disadvantage on Attack rolls and Saving throws.
Level 4: Hit point maximum halved.
Level 5: Speed reduced to 0.
Level 6: Death.
end_state: One level of exhaustion is removed after a long rest, depending on the cause

name: Frightened
desc: A frightened creature has disadvantage on Ability checks and Attack rolls while it can see the source of its fear.
The creature can't willingly move closer to the source of its fear.
end_state: Condition ends when the source of fear is destroyed or the duration expires

name: Grappled
desc: A grappled creature's speed becomes 0 and it can't benefit from any bonus to its speed.
The condition ends if the grappler is incapacitated.
Some class features can grapple enemies, such as Monk's Grappling Strike or Barbarian's Unarmored Defense.
end_state: Condition ends if the grappler is incapacitated or the grappled creature escapes

name: Incapacitated
desc: An incapacitated creature can't take actions or reactions.
end_state: Condition ends when the duration expires or source is removed

name: Invisible
desc: An invisible creature is impossible to see without the aid of magic or a special sense.
The creature's location can be detected by noise and smell.
Attack rolls against the invisible creature have disadvantage.
The invisible creature's attack rolls have advantage.
end_state: Condition ends when the duration expires or the creature makes an attack

name: Paralyzed
desc: A paralyzed creature is incapacitated and can't move or speak.
The creature automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws.
Attack rolls against the creature have advantage.
Any attack that hits the creature is a critical hit if the attacker is within 5 feet.
end_state: Condition ends when the duration expires or source is removed

name: Petrified
desc: A petrified creature is transformed, along with all its nonmagical equipment.
The creature is incapacitated and can't move or speak.
The creature has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws.
Attack rolls against the creature have advantage.
end_state: Condition ends when the duration expires or source is removed

name: Poisoned
desc: A poisoned creature has disadvantage on Attack rolls and Ability checks.
end_state: Condition ends when the duration expires or source is removed

name: Prone
desc: A prone creature has disadvantage on Attack rolls.
Attack rolls against the prone creature have advantage if the attacker is within 5 feet.
end_state: Condition ends when the creature stands up

name: Restrained
desc: A restrained creature's speed becomes 0 and it can't benefit from any bonus to its speed.
Attack rolls against the restrained creature have advantage.
The restrained creature's attack rolls have disadvantage.
end_state: Condition ends if the source of restraint is removed or duration expires

name: Stunned
desc: A stunned creature is incapacitated, can't move or speak, and automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws.
Attack rolls against the creature have advantage.
end_state: Condition ends when the duration expires or source is removed

name: Unconscious
desc: An unconscious creature is incapacitated, can't move or speak, and is unaware of its surroundings.
The creature drops whatever it's holding and falls prone.
The creature automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws.
Attack rolls against the creature have advantage.
Any attack that hits the creature is a critical hit if the attacker is within 5 feet.
end_state: Condition ends when the creature regains consciousness
